title: Secrets, Dependencies, Static Analysis, and Supply Chain · Failure Case: Sast Codeql
summary: Build layered security gates for source, dependencies, workflows, and releases. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates sast codeql increment in a secure-development gate stack. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use static security analysis for data flow and dangerous patterns with reviewed queries.
Scan direct and transitive dependencies and triage exploitability and reachability.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
